data.title: Catalyst Acoustics Group appoints C.M. as new CEO, effective Jan. 12.
data.description: A promotion was recently announced on January 20, 2026 by Catalyst Acoustics Group, a leading company in acoustic, seismic, vibration, and noise control brands. Charles Merrimon (C.M.) has been promoted to Chief Executive Officer as of January 12. The company is headquartered in Agawam, Massachusetts and is known for its elite group of brands focusing on these areas. This change in leadership signifies an important move for the company as it continues to grow and expand its operations.

data.title: Novavax licenses Matrix-M® to Pfizer for $30M upfront, potential $500M in milestones for up to two disease areas.
data.description: Pfizer has secured a non-exclusive license to use Matrix-M® in the development of its products for two specified disease areas. Novavax will receive an initial payment of $30 million from Pfizer, along with the opportunity to earn up to an additional $500 million based on achieving various development and sales milestones. This licensing agreement provides Novavax with significant potential earnings beyond the upfront payment.

data.title: Flow Capital Corp (TSXV:FW) announces $0.069 cash dividend per Series A Preferred Share paid on Jan 19, 2026.
data.description: Flow Capital Corp. (TSXV:FW) recently disclosed a cash dividend of $0.069 for each Series A Preferred Share ("Preferred Shares") on January 19, 2026, to shareholders on record as of December 31, 2025. This dividend covers the period from October 1, 2025, to December 31, 2025. Flow Capital, a prominent provider of flexible growth capital and alternative debt solutions, shared this news with satisfaction and continues to offer support to its investors.

data.title: Galbot S1 robot breaks industry load limits with 50KG heavy-duty capacity, meeting demands in modern manufacturing.
data.description: Today, in Beijing on January 20, 2026, leading global company Galbot introduced the Galbot S1, a robust industrial-grade embodied intelligence robot. Specifically created to cater to the increasing needs of contemporary manufacturing, this groundbreaking robot is set to revolutionize the industry. The Galbot S1 signifies a significant leap forward in the field of general-purpose robotics and embodied AI.
DAVOS-BELGIAN PM DE WEVER SAYS HE WILL MEET U.S. PRESIDENT TRUMP IN DAVOS ON WEDNESDAY

data.title: BX Partners launches BX Risk Shield™, a real-time market risk tool for financial advisors, to aid in decision-making.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - BX Partners, an investment consulting platform for CIOs, financial advisors, RIAs, and broker-dealers, has introduced BX Risk Shield™, a system that monitors market sentiment and trends in real-time. This tool aims to assist financial institutions and investment advisory firms in making better risk-allocation decisions amidst market uncertainties.BX Risk Shield™ is a research-driven solution that provides valuable insights to professionals in the finance industry.

data.title: Extreme Networks launches Extreme Partner First in Jan. 2026 to simplify partner programs and eliminate complexity.
data.description: Extreme Networks, based in Morrisville, North Carolina, announced the release of Extreme Partner First in January 2026. This program aims to simplify the partner experience by removing the complexities often seen in traditional partner programs.

data.title: ABBYY releases Vantage 3.0 in Austin, integrating with AI and enhancing compliance, privacy features.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, ABBYY has unveiled Vantage 3.0, a new offering that integrates with Generative AI and includes advanced features for compliance and privacy.

data.title: 908 Devices reports strong Q4 2025 financial results with revenue at $17.2 million, up from $14.3 million in Q4 2024.
data.description: Burlington, Massachusetts-based 908 Devices Inc. (Nasdaq: MASS), a leading small-cap growth firm specializing in handheld chemical analysis devices for crucial health, safety, and defense tech applications, disclosed its preliminary unaudited financials for the quarter and full year that concluded on December 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter of 2025, preliminary unaudited revenue reached around $17.2 million, a noticeable uptick from $14.3 million reported in the same quarter of the previous year. This growth highlights the company's advancements in its financial performance.

data.title: FHLBank Chicago launches $28 million Downpayment Plus Grant programs to help homebuyers in Illinois and Wisconsin.
data.description: The Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) is tackling housing affordability by introducing the 2026 Downpayment Plus (DPP®) and Downpayment Plus Advantage® (DPP Advantage®) grant initiatives. A total of $28 million will be allocated to aid income-eligible homebuyers in Illinois and Wisconsin in conquering the obstacle of saving for a down payment. This move aims to support individuals in achieving homeownership by alleviating financial burdens associated with purchasing a home. This effort is crucial amidst the ongoing challenges surrounding housing affordability.

data.title: Ethiopian Airlines orders 9 Dreamliners and 11 737 MAX jets from Boeing to expand international network.
data.description: Ethiopian Airlines, based in East Africa, plans to enhance its global presence by utilizing additional 787-9 jets in its fleet. The airline has also finalized the acquisition of 11 more 737 MAX aircraft. This strategic move comes after the order of nine new aircraft from Boeing, indicating a significant expansion in their international network. The development was revealed in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia, with Boeing and Ethiopian Airlines collaborating on this major deal. The airline's ambitious growth strategy underscores its position as the biggest carrier in Africa.

data.title: ReposiTrak adds 20 beverage suppliers to traceability network, sharing FDA-required Key Data Elements.
data.description: Salt Lake City - Today, ReposiTrak, the global leader in food traceability and compliance networks, revealed that 20 beverage suppliers who distribute through a top natural and specialty foods distributor are set to join the ReposiTrak Traceability Network®. These suppliers will utilize ReposiTrak's inventory management and out-of-stock reduction software platform to share FDA-mandated Key Data Elements (KDEs) for every Critical Tracking Event. The company's stock (NYSE: TRAK) was mentioned in the announcement.

data.title: Italian grocery retailer Multicedi uses Armis Centrix to enhance cybersecurity, addressing issues proactively. Director praises effectiveness.
data.description: In San Francisco today, Armis, a cybersecurity company, revealed that Multicedi, a major grocery retail group in Central and Southern Italy, has adopted Armis Centrix™, the Cyber Exposure Management Platform, to enhance its cybersecurity defense. According to Livio De Prisco, Information Systems Director at Multicedi, previously, crucial problems were only tackled after malfunctions or unusual incidents had taken place. This move aims to prevent such occurrences in the future and improve the organization's security protocols.

data.title: Magellan Jets launches Magellan Jets Journeys program for Private Clients with exclusive travel experiences beyond flying.
data.description: Magellan Jets, a prominent private aviation company based in Boston, has introduced a new program called Magellan Jets Journeys. This initiative is designed to provide unique travel experiences for the company's Private Clients. With Journeys, clients can access exclusive travel escapes that go beyond just flying. These personalized trips are meticulously planned by Magellan Jets to deliver top-tier hospitality from the aircraft to the final destination. The program includes special collaborations for unforgettable experiences.

data.title: Cargill recognized with 2026 BIG Innovation Award in Innovative Organizations category with 159 other companies, leaders.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Cargill was recently recognized as a leading innovator in the 2026 BIG Innovation Awards by the Business Intelligence Group. The company was named a Top 10 Innovator and awarded in the Innovative Organizations category. This accolade acknowledges Cargill's commitment to innovation within the global food and agriculture sector. Among 159 companies, products, and individuals driving change through applied innovation, Cargill stood out for its disciplined approach. This recognition highlights Cargill's significant contributions to transforming industries and driving measurable real-world impact.

data.title: Ziff Davis to join Susquehanna 15th Annual Technology Conference on Feb 26, 2026 in NY. (NASDAQ: ZD)
data.description: Ziff Davis, Inc. revealed its involvement in an upcoming investor conference in February. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ZD, will be participating in the Susquehanna 15th Annual Technology Conference. This event is scheduled to take place at the Lotte New York Palace in New York City on February 26, 2026. Ziff Davis is a specialized digital media and internet firm with a diverse portfolio encompassing prominent brands in technology, shopping, and gaming sectors. The conference will not have a webcast for the formal presentation.
